name: woodstockadu
description: Static marketing site + lead backend for woodstockadu.com (Cloudflare Pages + D1)

scripts.leads: PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/node@23/bin:$PATH" wrangler d1 execute woodstockadu-leads --remote --command "SELECT created_at,intent,name,email,phone,plan,estimate FROM leads ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20"
